title: thelymitra silena
intro: Thelymitra silena, also known as the brown-veined sun orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thelymitra silena include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, such as eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and powdering the roots, which can then be used in infusions, decoctions, or as a topical cream.
